case_title: RELATED MANAGEMENT CO., L.P. VS. BATERDENE TUMURBAT

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RELATED MANAGEMENT CO., L.P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TUMURBAT, BATERDENE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2555 SUTTER STREET, UNIT 230, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94115, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210020612)
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF RELATED MANAGEMENT CO., L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT TUMURBAT, BATERDENE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TUMURBAT, BATERDENE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT TUMURBAT, BATERDENE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RELATED MANAGEMENT CO., L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT TUMURBAT, BATERDENE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
COPY OF LEASE (TRANSACTION ID # 210019051) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RELATED MANAGEMENT CO., L.P.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 210017083) AS TO DEFENDANT TUMURBAT, BATERDENE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RELATED MANAGEMENT CO., L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT TUMURBAT, BATERDENE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ; PLAINTIFF'S MANDATORY COVER SHEET AND SUPPLEMENTAL ALLEGATIONS-UD, (TRANSACTION ID # 210017160), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF RELATED MANAGEMENT CO., L.P. SERVED SEP-12-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TUMURBAT, BATERDENE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $99.67 FILED BY PLAINTIFF RELATED MANAGEMENT CO., L.P.
